name: Overstuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and pat dry the mushrooms, then remove the stems and set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, mix together the cream cheese, softened deviled ham, chopped olives, prepared mustard, onion powder, ground turmeric, and ground black pepper until well combined.
3. Spoon or pipe the mixture into each mushroom cap.
4. Garnish with diced pimiento.
5. Yield: about 50 stuffed mushrooms (about 1-1/2 cups filling).
